aiSummary: Las campeonas de AEW y WWE, Thekla y Gunther, destacan la pujanza del país europeo en la lucha libre profesional, llevando el nombre de Austria a la cima mundial.
fullArticle:
AEW Women’s World Champion Thekla recently noted how happy she is to see herself and WWE’s Gunther represent Austria in pro wrestling.

While Europe has a big indie pro-wrestling scene, Austria is not one of the names that come to mind first. Despite the challenges, AEW’s Thekla and WWE’s Gunther have emerged from the European nation to become some of the biggest names in the industry.

While Gunther is WWE’s longest-reigning Intercontinental Champion and a former World Champion, Thekla currently serves as AEW’s Women’s World Champion. Recently speaking to TMZ Sports, she opened up about Austria’s thriving pro-wrestling industry because of them.

“I think that within Austria the scene has been thriving, from what I’ve heard. Probably due to people like myself and also another gentleman ove...
imageAlt: Austria brilla en la lucha libre: Thekla y Gunther rompen moldes y elevan al país al escenario mundial
keyPoints: Thekla, campeona mundial de AEW, y Gunther, campeón intercontinental de WWE, comparten raíces vienesas y marcan la presencia internacional de Austria en la lucha libre
Ambos atletas, de 38 años, han superado la limitada escena local para convertirse en figuras globales, demostrando la calidad de entrenamiento y talento del país
El orgullo nacional se refleja cuando Thekla menciona que la escena austriaca ha florecido gracias a su presencia y la de Gunther, generando inspiración local
La rivalidad amistosa entre ambos, sin competir, resalta la diversidad de estilos y la colaboración entre las principales federaciones, AEW y WWE

multimedia.alt: Thekla proud of she & Gunther representing Austria in wrestling
multimedia.caption: Thekla | AEW

title: Austria brilla en la lucha libre: Thekla y Gunther rompen moldes y elevan al país al escenario mundial
